case_title: CHRIS MATAL SOL VS. DOUGLAS A PRUTTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,329.00 FILED BY SOL, CHRIS MATAL AS TO DEFENDANT PRUTTON, DOUGLAS A (DOUGLAS A. PRUTTON, ESQ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-19-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PRUTTON, DOUGLAS A (DOUGLAS A. PRUTTON, ESQ)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-23-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOL, CHRIS MATAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRUTTON, DOUGLAS A (DOUGLAS A. PRUTTON, ESQ) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
